sectionDescription: Don't wait for your parents to tell their stories; be the one who asks. A Phygital journey to help you build your family legacy from afar.

steps.title: The 'Memory Unlocker' Album
steps.subtitle: A filial gift from afar
steps.description: You ship home a premium physical album. Each page is a space for parents to place old photos and a unique QR code identity, removing all technological barriers.
features: Easy to use for the elderly
A treasure to pass down through generations

steps.title: Intelligent Storytelling Assistant
steps.subtitle: So words of love are easier to say
steps.description: When scanning the QR, parents don't just record; they receive 'Storytelling Guides'. We design guided scripts to help even the most reserved parents open up naturally.
features: AI noise cancellation directly in the browser

steps.title: Eternal Digital Museum
steps.subtitle: The greatest asset you will ever own
steps.description: You play the role of 'Curator'. Organize, edit, and store the life fragments of your parents into a vivid, living timeline.
features: AI transcribes voice into written memoirs
Restoration of old photos into emotional videos
